_comment: Active project MCP servers for Project-Lynx (verified 2026-06-13). Secrets are NOT stored here — they expand from your shell env via ${VAR}. Community stdio servers (context7/polymarket/foundry) auto-run via npx at startup; polymarket needs the @jsr registry mapping in .npmrc; foundry needs Foundry installed (foundryup).

_risk_notes.circle: Official Circle remote HTTP endpoint. No local code execution. Codegen/SDK-reference only — does not sign or move funds.
_risk_notes.lifi: Official LI.FI remote HTTP endpoint. No local code execution. Read-only (quotes/status/chains) — does not assemble/sign EnterBasket.
_risk_notes.context7: Community npm (Upstash, official publisher). Runs `npx @upstash/context7-mcp` at startup. Up-to-date SDK docs lookup.
_risk_notes.polymarket: Community npm (@iqai). Runs at startup. READ-ONLY: no POLYMARKET_PRIVATE_KEY set, so it cannot trade — odds/market data only.
_risk_notes.foundry: Community npm (PraneshASP, 'experimental'). Runs at startup. Needs local Foundry on PATH; no PRIVATE_KEY set (build/read only).
